title: Project E
wikitext:
'''Project E''' is the term used by [[Gehirn]] for the project to create the [[Evangelions|Evangelion Units]], clones of the First [[Angels|Angel]], [[Adam]].  It is also referred to as the "Adam Revival Project".

[[Category:A to Z]]
html: Project E is the term used by Gehirn for the project to create the Evangelion Units, clones of the First Angel, Adam. It is also referred to as the "Adam Revival Project".
